title: ఎస్బీఐ 3-ఇన్‌-1 అకౌంట్‌
description: ప్రభుత్వ రంగ బ్యాంకింగ్‌ సంస్థ ఎస్బీఐ తమ 71వ వ్యవస్థాపక దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా రిటైల్‌, బిజినెస్‌ బ్యాంకింగ్‌ బలోపేతానికి కృత్రిమ మేధస్సు (ఏఐ) ఆధారిత డిజిటల్‌ సదుపాయాలను బుధవారం ఆవిష్కరించింది. రిటైల్‌ కస్టమర్ల కోసం యోనో సేవలను విస్తరించినట్టు ఓ ప్రకటనలో బ్యాంక్‌ తెలిపింది.
content:
న్యూఢిల్లీ, జూలై 1: ప్రభుత్వ రంగ బ్యాంకింగ్‌ సంస్థ ఎస్బీఐ తమ 71వ వ్యవస్థాపక దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా రిటైల్‌, బిజినెస్‌ బ్యాంకింగ్‌ బలోపేతానికి కృత్రిమ మేధస్సు (ఏఐ) ఆధారిత డిజిటల్‌ సదుపాయాలను బుధవారం ఆవిష్కరించింది. రిటైల్‌ కస్టమర్ల కోసం యోనో సేవలను విస్తరించినట్టు ఓ ప్రకటనలో బ్యాంక్‌ తెలిపింది.
అలాగే కొత్త ఖాతాదారులు.. ఓ సింగిల్‌ 3-ఇన్‌-1 డిజిటల్‌ ఆన్‌బోర్డింగ్‌ ప్రక్రియ ద్వారా ఎస్బీఐక్యాప్‌ సెక్యూరిటీస్‌ లిమిటెడ్‌తో డీమ్యాట్‌, ట్రేడింగ్‌ అకౌంట్లు కలగలిసిన సేవింగ్స్‌ అకౌంట్‌ను తెరుచుకునే అవకాశాన్ని కల్పించింది. ఇక అర్హత కలిగిన కస్టమర్లు తమ సేవింగ్స్‌ ఖాతాను ఆన్‌లైన్‌లోనే కార్పొరేట్‌ సాలరీ అకౌంట్‌గా మార్చుకోవచ్చు. డిజిటల్‌ బ్యాంకింగ్‌ లావాదేవీల ద్వారా ఖాతాదారులు కర్బన ఉద్గారాలను ఎంత మేరకు ఆదా చేశారో తెలుసుకోవచ్చు.
ఇలా నెలవారీ గ్రీన్‌ స్కోర్‌నూ చూసుకోవచ్చు. ఏజెంటిక్‌ ఏఐ ఆధారిత ‘యోనో జీ’ని పరిచయం చేసింది. యోనో బిజినెస్‌ వెబ్‌, మొబైల్‌ వేదికల్లో నిరంతరం అందుబాటులో ఉంటుంది. డిజిటల్‌ ఇన్నోవేషన్‌, ఏఐ ఇంటెలిజెన్స్‌ల వినియోగంతో బ్యాంకింగ్‌ సేవలను మరింత సరళతరం చేయాలన్నదే తమ లక్ష్యమని ఈ సందర్భంగా బ్యాంక్‌ చైర్మన్‌ సీఎస్‌ శెట్టి అన్నారు.

title: Terror must end before India-Pakistan talks: Chugh
description:
Says under PM Modi, India follows zero tolerance on terror
New Delhi, June 30: BJP National General Secretary and Rajya Sabha MP Tarun Chugh on Tuesday criticised political leaders who endorsed an appeal seeking restoration of dialogue and normal relations with Pakistan, saying such calls ignore the issue of cross-border terrorism.
In a statement, Chugh named several political leaders and questioned appeals for engagement with Pakistan without addressing what he described as Pakistan-sponsored terrorism and infiltration.
He said those advocating dialogue should direct their concerns towards Pakistan and seek action against terrorist infrastructure, an end to cross-border terrorism, and accountability for supporting militant activities.
Chugh maintained that any move towards normal bilateral engagement should follow credible action against terrorism and reiterated the BJP’s position that “terror and talks cannot go together”.
"They should ask Pakistan to admit its mistakes before the world and announce an irreversible end to the policy of training, financing and sheltering terrorists. That would be a genuine contribution to peace," Chugh said.
Referring to past terror attacks, he said concerns of victims and national security must remain central to any discussion on relations with Pakistan.
He added that under Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s leadership, India continues to follow a policy of zero tolerance towards terrorism and remains committed to raising concerns over cross-border terrorism at international forums.

title: NC finalises plans for protest at Jantar Mantar
description:
Decision taken to seek support from INDIA bloc , non-aligned parties
Srinagar, July 01: Senior leaders of the Jammu and Kashmir National Conference on Wednesday met Party President Dr. Farooq Abdullah at his residence in Gupkar, Srinagar, to review and finalize arrangements for the party's proposed protest at Jantar Mantar, New Delhi.
In a statement, the party said, during the meeting, it was resolved that all constituent parties of the INDIA Bloc, along with other political parties in Jammu and Kashmir, would be formally invited to participate in the protest. 
The statement further reads that it was also decided to send invitations to leaders of parties that are not part of the INDIA bloc but are also not aligned with the NDA.
Formal invitation letters will be sent to all political parties in Jammu and Kashmir, with Party President Dr. Farooq Abdullah personally writing to their respective leaders, inviting them to join the protest.

India vs England 1st T20I Highlights: Match Washed Out After India Post 189 In First Innings
description: IND VS ENG 1st T20I Highlights: Heavy rain just before the second innings was about to start led to the match being called off without England playing a single delivery. Earlier ,India posted 189 on the board despite losing Sanju Samson (1) and Ishan Kishan (0) in the first overs, when there were just six runs on the board. Abhishek Sharma changed the momentum of the game with a counter attack in the powerplay. He made a 20-ball fifty and finished with 59 runs after making 24 balls. Shreyas Iyer anchored the innings and got his maiden fifty as Indian captain with a knock of 68 in 44 balls. Shivam Dube gave India a brilliant finish with a fine cameo. He made a 21-ball 42 and remained unbeaten. Sadiq Mahmood took three wickets for England. Shreyas Iyer won the toss and chose to bat first. There was no debut in sight for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Varun Chakravarthy returned while Ravi Bishnoi also got a place as the Men in Blue opted for three spinners.India Playing XI:Sanju Samson, Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan, Shreyas Iyer (Captain), Tilak Varma, Harshit Rana, Shivam Dube, Axar Patel, Ravi Bishnoi, Arshdeep Singh, Varun CVEngland Playing XI: Philip Salt, Jos Buttler(w), Harry Brook(c), Jacob Bethell, Tom Banton, Sam Curran, Will Jacks, Liam Dawson, Saqib Mahmood, Adil Rashid, Luke WoodIndia Squad: Sanju Samson, Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan(w), Shreyas Iyer(c), Tilak Varma, Axar Patel, Shivam Dube, Suryansh Shedge, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Washington Sundar, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Prasidh Krishna, Varun Chakaravarthy, Ravi BishnoiEngland Squad: Philip Salt, Jos Buttler(w), Harry Brook(c), Jacob Bethell, Tom Banton, Sam Curran, Will Jacks, Liam Dawson, Saqib Mahmood, Adil Rashid, Luke Wood, Jordan Cox, James Coles, Rehan Ahmed, Sonny Baker

title: RDU Plane Crash Today Video: Corporate Jet Collides With Box Truck at Raleigh-Durham Airport
description: Two people were on board the aircraft and one person was driving the truck. Airport officials said no injuries were reported.
content: A corporate jet and a box truck collided on a taxiway at North Carolina's Raleigh-Durham International Airport on Wednesday, prompting a temporary closure of the airfield, airport officials said. The collision occurred on Taxiway C and involved a general aviation aircraft and a box truck, according to Raleigh-Durham International Airport (RDU). Two people were on board the aircraft and one person was driving the truck. Airport officials said no injuries were reported. The airfield was briefly closed while the incident was investigated before reopening later on Wednesday. title: Zanskar–Manali road closed after cloudburst at Jispa
description:
Zanaskar: The District Police Zanskar on Monday issued a public advisory informing commuters that traffic movement on the Zanskar–Manali Road has been suspended after a cloudburst blocked the highway at Jispa in Himachal Pradesh's Lahaul and Spiti district.
According to the advisory, the information was received from the Senior Superintendent of Police (SSP), Lahaul and Spiti, stating that the road has become impassable due to the cloudburst, forcing the suspension of all vehicular movement on the route until further notice.
Authorities have advised commuters, tourists, transporters, and the general public not to undertake any journey towards Manali through the Zanskar–Manali Road until the affected stretch is cleared and officially reopened by the concerned authorities.
The police have urged people to strictly follow the advisory and cooperate with the administration to ensure public safety. Travelers have also been requested to stay updated through official announcements before planning their journeys.
District Police Zanskar expressed regret for the inconvenience caused and said the restrictions have been imposed purely in the interest of public safety. Restoration work is expected to begin once weather conditions permit and the road is declared safe for traffic by the concerned agencies.

title: Leh gets India’s first petroglyph conservation park
description:
31 ancient rock arts preserved so far: LG Saxena 
Leh, July 1: The Lieutenant Governor of Ladakh, Vinai Kumar Saxena said that work on India's first Petroglyph Conservation Park at Sindhu Ghat in Leh is progressing rapidly, with 31 ancient petroglyphs already relocated and preserved as part of the ambitious heritage conservation initiative.
Sharing the update on X, the Lieutenant Governor said the project marks a significant milestone in preserving Ladakh's rich archaeological and cultural legacy. He informed that the petroglyphs have been carefully shifted from Saboo Thang to the conservation park, where they will be protected for future generations.
According to the LG, the relocated petroglyphs range from 4 feet to 17 feet in circumference and weigh between 500 kilograms and 10 metric tonnes, highlighting the complex and meticulous nature of the relocation process.
He further stated that, under the first phase of the project, a total of 155 petroglyphs will be preserved at the conservation park, making it the country's first dedicated facility for conserving ancient rock art.
Saxena described the petroglyphs as invaluable records of India's civilisational journey and cultural identity. He said the establishment of the Petroglyph Conservation Park represents a historic step towards safeguarding Ladakh's priceless archaeological heritage from natural degradation and other threats.
The Lieutenant Governor emphasized that the initiative is not only aimed at protecting these ancient carvings but also at promoting heritage education, archaeological research, and public awareness about Ladakh's unique cultural history.
He added that the conservation park will eventually emerge as a world-class destination for responsible cultural tourism, allowing visitors, researchers, historians, and students to explore and appreciate the region's ancient rock art while ensuring its long-term preservation.
The project is expected to strengthen Ladakh's position as an important heritage tourism destination and contribute significantly to the conservation of one of the Himalayas' oldest archaeological treasures.

title: US home battery installations hit record high on rising electricity costs
description: Record home battery installations unlock options for grids—and AI data centers.
content:
US homeowners have embraced home batteries in record-breaking numbers in early 2026, spurred on by state incentives while seeking to offset rising residential electricity costs. The trend could even unlock a more flexible energy supply for power grid operators and even AI data centers.
New home battery installations reached a record 673 megawatts of energy storage in the first quarter of 2026, according to the US Energy Information Administration. That trend was driven by states with high electricity prices that have implemented policies to incentivize home battery installation, Bloomberg News reported.
This residential battery trend stands out as a natural next step for states that have already successfully boosted rooftop solar adoption among homeowners, given how batteries enable homeowners to use stored solar energy at night. California and Hawaii accounted for the majority of new residential battery storage, while Texas and Arizona also saw significantly higher numbers of installations.Read full article

ରାଉରକେଲା (ଦେବବ୍ରତ ଗଡ଼ତିଆ): ସମ୍ଭ୍ରାନ୍ତ ସିଭିଲଟାଉନ୍‌ସିପ୍‌ ହେଉ କି ଛେଣ୍ଡ୍‌, ବାସନ୍ତୀକଲୋନି, ରାଉରକେଲା ସହରର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଜନବସତି ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ଘର ଛାତ ଉପରେ ବେଆଇନ ଭାବେ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ ଟାୱାର ସ୍ଥାପନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଆବାସିକ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଉଚ୍ଚ କ୍ଷମତା ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ ଟାୱାର ବସାଇବା ପାଇଁ କଡ଼ା କଟକଣା ରହିଛି। କିନ୍ତୁ ଘର ମାଲିକ ଅଧିକ ପଇସା ଲୋଭରେ ପ୍ରଶାସନର ବିନା ଅନୁମତିରେ ନିଜ ଘର ଛାତକୁ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ କମ୍ପାନିଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଭଡ଼ାରେ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ସହରର ପ୍ରାୟ ସବୁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଏଭଳି ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ପରିଲକ୍ଷିତ ହୁଏ। ଏହି ଭାରୀ ଟାୱାରଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପୁରୁଣା ବିଲଡିଂର ଛାତ ଉପରେ ବସାଯାଉଥିବାରୁ ବର୍ଷା ଓ ବାତ୍ୟା ସମୟରେ ବଡ଼ଧରଣର ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାର ଆଶଙ୍କା ରହିଛି। ଅଞ୍ଚଳବାସୀ ଏ ନେଇ ବାରମ୍ବାର ରାଉରକେଲା ମହାନଗର ନିଗମ ନିକଟରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ କୌଣସି ଦୃଢ଼ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଉନଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ହୁଏ।
ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ରିଲାଏନ୍ସ ଜିଓ, ଭାରତୀ ଏୟାର୍‌ଟେଲ, ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ୍‌ ଓ ଭୋଡ଼ାଫୋନ ଆଇଡିଆ ଲିମିଟେଡ୍‌ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ମୋବାଇଲ ସେବା ଯୋଗାଇ ଦିଆଯାଉଛି। ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଏହି ସଂସ୍ଥାଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମୋଟ୍‌ ୧୭୧୬ଟି ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ରହିଛି। ତେବେ ଏଥିମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୪୫୬ଟି ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ୍‌ ଟାୱାର ରହିଛି। ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ସମେତ ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ସମସ୍ତ ୧୦ଟି ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ମୋଟ୍‌ ୭୫୩୮ ଟି ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ରହିଛି। ଏହା ହେଉଛି ରାଜ୍ୟର ମୋଟ୍‌ ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ତୁଳନାରେ ୨୩.୬୩%।
ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଥିବା ମୋଟ୍‌ ଟାୱାର ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୧୪୫୨ଟି (୧୯.୨୬%) ହେଉଛି ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ ଟାୱାର। ଉଲ୍ଲେଖଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ପଶ୍ଚିମ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ବଲାଙ୍ଗୀର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ମୋଟ୍‌ ୯୫୭ଟି ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ଥିବାବେଳେ ବରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ୯୦୮, ବୌଦ୍ଧରେ ୨୬୨, ଦେବଗଡ଼ରେ ୨୪୦, ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ାରେ ୫୭୪, କଳାହାଣ୍ଡିରେ ୧୧୭୩, ନୂଆପଡ଼ାରେ ୩୭୬, ସମ୍ବଲପୁରରେ ୧୦୧୮ ଓ ସୋନପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ୩୧୫ଟି ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ରହିଛି। ତେବେ ସରକାରୀ ସଂସ୍ଥା ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଯେଉଁ ଅନୁପାତରେ ଟାୱାର ସ୍ଥାପନ କରାଯିବା କଥା, ତାହା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳୁନି। 
ସୁନ୍ଦରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ମୋଟ୍‌ ୪୫୬ଟି ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ୍‌ ଟାୱାର ଥିବାବେଳେ ବଲାଙ୍ଗୀର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ୧୩୨, ବରଗଡ଼ରେ ୧୧୧, ବୌଦ୍ଧରେ ୮୫, ଦେବଗଡ଼ରେ ୯୬, ଝାରସୁଗୁଡ଼ାରେ ୮୧, କଳାହାଣ୍ଡିରେ ୧୮୬, ନୂଆପଡ଼ାରେ ୬୨, ସମ୍ବଲପୁରରେ ୨୦୩ ଓ ସୋନପୁରରେ ୪୦ଟି ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ୍‌ ମୋବାଇଲ ଟାୱାର ରହିଛି। ଅବଶ୍ୟ, ଏବେ ମୋବାଇଲ ସଂଯୋଗୀକରଣରୁ ବଞ୍ଚିତ ଉପାନ୍ତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ବିଏସ୍‌ଏନ୍‌ଏଲ୍‌ ଟାୱାର ସ୍ଥାପନ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଛି। ଡିଜିଟାଲ୍ ଭାରତ ନିଧି ଯୋଜନା ଅଧୀନରେ ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଦୁର୍ଗମ ଓ ଗ୍ରାମାଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଉଚ୍ଚକ୍ଷମତା ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ ୪ଜି ଓ ୫ଜି ସେବା ଯୋଗାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଏହି ନୂତନ ଟାୱାରଗୁଡ଼ିକ ସ୍ଥାପନ କରାଯାଉଛି।

title: ‘Miyane Wachik Kotar’ released at literary event in Srinagar
description:
Event highlights efforts to preserve , promote literary heritage
Srinagar, July 1: The Jammu & Kashmir Academy of Art, Culture and Languages (J&KAACL) on Wednesday organised a grand literary function to release the Kashmiri book – ‘Miyane Wachik Kotar’ authored by noted writer Bashir Arif at Tagore Hall here.
The event witnessed the participation of eminent scholars, writers, poets, critics, academicians, students and lovers of Kashmiri literature, reflecting the Academy’s continued commitment to the promotion and preservation of the region’s rich literary heritage.
The function was presided over by Prof M Zaman Azurdah, while eminent Kashmiri scholar, literary critic and former Head of the Department of Kashmiri, University of Kashmir, Prof Shafi Shouq, graced the occasion as the Chief Guest.
The distinguished personalities who adorned the presidium included the author Bashir Arif, Shahzadi Saiman, Prof Majrooh Rashid, Bashir Budgami, Rafiq Masoodi, Shafaq Sopori, Additional Secretary Academy Ideel Saleem and Rukhsana Jabeen.
The programme commenced with a welcome address by Ideel Saleem, Additional Secretary, JKAACL, who welcomed the distinguished guests, writers, scholars and participants.
Expressing his gratitude, author Bashir Arif thanked JKAACL for publishing and releasing his book. He also expressed his sincere appreciation to the scholars who critically examined the work and shared valuable insights. He described the occasion as one of the most memorable milestones of his literary journey.
Several writers, poets and scholars present in the audience also shared their views on the book and appreciated the Academy’s initiatives in fostering literary culture through regular publication of books and organisation of literary events across Jammu and Kashmir.
In his address, he highlighted the Academy’s sustained efforts to promote Kashmiri language and literature through publications, seminars, book release functions, literary interactions and cultural programmes. 
He remarked that JKAACL remains committed to providing a vibrant platform for writers and intellectuals to engage in meaningful literary discourse and to encourage creative expression across generations.
The function concluded on a note of appreciation for the Academy’s continued efforts in promoting Kashmiri language and literature through meaningful literary initiatives and providing a common platform for writers, scholars and readers to engage in constructive intellectual exchange.

title: Phase-I of census completed in J&K, Ladakh
description:
Over 6.67 lakh households opt for self-enumeration 
Srinagar, July 1: The first phase of Census 2027, comprising House Listing Operations (HLO), has been completed across the Union Territories of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh after a month-long exercise conducted from June 1 to June 30, 2026.
Chief Principal Census Officer (CPCO) and Director Census Operations (DCO), J&K and Ladakh, Amit Sharma said the entire operation was conducted through digital means, marking full implementation of end-to-end digital technology in the census process. He said the exercise was completed without any major technical disruptions.
Sharma congratulated officers and field functionaries involved in the exercise, including Principal Census Officers, Charge Officers, Nodal Officers, Master Trainers, Field Trainers, Enumerators and Supervisors, for ensuring timely completion of the operations.
He said 24,071 digitally mapped and geo-referenced House Listing Blocks across 295 Census Charges were covered in Jammu & Kashmir, while 567 blocks across 17 charges were covered in Ladakh. The exercise included urban, rural, border, tribal, remote and difficult terrain areas.
The CPCO said extensive capacity-building programmes were conducted prior to the exercise, with over 29,000 enumerators and supervisors trained in J&K and over 700 in Ladakh. More than 27,000 census kits were distributed in J&K and around 800 in Ladakh.
He said the success of Phase-I was the result of coordinated efforts between the Census Directorate, district administrations and field staff, supported by regular reviews, field inspections and digital monitoring. Awareness campaigns through print, electronic and social media also contributed to smooth execution.
Sharma further informed that over 6.67 lakh households in Jammu & Kashmir and 7,009 households in Ladakh participated in the self-enumeration process ahead of field operations.
He said preparations for the next phase have begun, with District Census Handbooks scheduled to be compiled from August 1, 2026, while population enumeration in snow-bound areas will be conducted as per schedule, followed by the remaining areas in February 2027.

title: Ex-CIA Director John Brennan Sues Trump DOJ. Here's Why
description: Former CIA Director John Brennan sued the Trump administration, seeking a court order to preserve records tied to investigations he says are politically motivated and aimed at retaliating against him.
content: Former CIA Director John Brennan sued the Trump administration on Wednesday, demanding a court order that would require officials to preserve records from investigations that he says are targeting him for “phantom criminal conduct.”Brennan said in the lawsuit that the records would be essential for him to mount a defense on vindictive prosecution grounds in the event of a future indictment brought by the administration. Such a defense, his lawyers said, would be supported by the more than 100 verbal or written statements that President Donald Trump has made since 2017 lambasting Brennan and by the Republican president’s directives to his Department of Justice to initiate cases “without regard to factual or legal justification.”“To fully consider those motions, the reviewing judge would need to scrutinize the motivations of the Justice Department officials who directed, oversaw, or undertook those actions to determine whether they violated Director Brennan’s rights, and specifically whether they were motivated by a desire to vindictively prosecute him as an act of retribution,” Brennan’s lawyers wrote in the lawsuit filed in federal court in Washington.The lawsuit names as defendants Trump and other top law enforcement officials from his administration, including acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, FBI Director Kash Patel and the prosecutors in Florida who have been overseeing investigations related to Brennan and other former perceived Trump adversaries.The lawsuit says Brennan is facing separate investigations based in Florida, including one examining whether he made a false statement to Congress related to an assessment by intelligence agencies documenting Russian interference in the 2016 presidential election, when Trump defeated Democrat Hillary Clinton. The other investigation aims to determine whether former law enforcement and intelligence officials conspired to undermine Trump, including during the course of the Russian interference investigation.No charges have been brought. The Department of Justice has denied claims of weaponization.

title: Angela Nikolau and Ivan Beerkus: Photos of Couple From Netflix's 'Skywalkers' Doc Who Climbed Empire State Building Revealed
description: Video from the scene showed the pair remaining at the top of the antenna for about 30 minutes before beginning their descent.
content: Russian urban climbers Angela Nikolau and Ivan Beerkus have identified themselves as the pair who scaled the antenna of New York City's Empire State Building before becoming engaged during the descent. The couple, both dressed in black, climbed to the top of the landmark's 1,454-foot spire on Wednesday, where they unfurled a banner reading: "When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace." The message is a variation of a quote often attributed to guitarist Jimi Hendrix but originally spoken by 19th-century British Prime Minister William Gladstone. Video from the scene showed the pair remaining at the top of the antenna for about 30 minutes before beginning their descent. As they reached a platform lower down the spire, Beerkus appeared to kneel and propose to Nikolau, who accepted the proposal before the couple embraced and kissed. Police officers later reached the pair on the structure and took them into custody shortly before 13:00 local time, according to US media reports. Authorities have not publicly detailed any potential charges. The climb prompted an emergency response after the pair were spotted high above Midtown Manhattan. It remains unclear how they gained access to the transmitter and climbed the structure. Nikolau, 33, and Beerkus, 32, are known for climbing skyscrapers and other tall structures without ropes or harnesses. Their exploits were featured in the 2024 Netflix documentary Skywalkers: A Love Story, which followed their ascent of Malaysia's Merdeka 118 tower, the world's second-tallest building.After lingering at the top of the tower for around 30 minutes, the climbers began making their way down the spire to the viewing platform, which appears to have been evacuated. According to a report by The New York Post, as the couple reached a platform at the base of the spire, Beerkus dropped down on one knee and proposed to Nikolau — who was wearing a black cat mask — with a ring that she later flaunted on Instagram.The couple was taken into custody without incident upon reaching the ground and charges are pending, according to the NYPD. It was not immediately clear if they bought tickets to access the observation deck, but a source familiar told The Post they allegedly breached a mesh gate on the 102nd floor — a publicly accessible floor — to reach the 103rd floor, which gave them access to the spire.

title: Superworms could replace beetles for cleaning skeletal remains
description: An optimal ratio of 10-15 grams of larvae per gram of specimen minimized cleaning time with no bone damage.
content:
Fatemeh Rastekar, Niloofar Alaei Kakhki and Morteza Monfared discuss the safe and practical utility of superworm larvae for cleaning museum specimens. Credit: Anthony Lewis, PLOS/CC-BY 4.0
    

    
      
      
    
    
      Fatemeh Rastekar, Niloofar Alaei Kakhki and Morteza Monfared discuss the safe and practical utility of superworm larvae for cleaning museum specimens. Credit: Anthony Lewis, PLOS/CC-BY 4.0

          
  
    
  


Preparing skeletal specimens for display in museums or for forensic studies requires the bones to be thoroughly cleaned to remove any remaining flesh or soft tissue. However, the need for thorough cleaning must be balanced against the risk of damaging the actual bones. According to a new paper published in the journal PLoS One, the larvae of so-called "superworms" (Zophobas morio)—a common pet food—offer a practical alternative.
There are existing methods for cleaning skeletal remains, such as burial, digestive enzymes, or chemical treatments. But most have drawbacks, including damaging bones, taking a long time to process, having expensive operational costs, or the use of environmentally hazardous substances. Using dermestid beetles has become the preferred method for skeletal cleaning since they can efficiently remove soft tissue without damaging the bone. The downside is that without strict containment practices, the beetles can escape and lay eggs that hatch, leading to infestations that threaten museum collections.
Fatemah Rastekar of Ferdowsi University of Mashhad in Iran and co-authors thought superworms might bring the same benefits as the beetles without the risk of infestation. For one thing, beetle colonies span all life stages and hence require complex containment; superworm cleaning only requires the larval stage, which lasts 10–12 weeks compared to just five to seven weeks for the beetles. And the larvae don't pupate in crowded conditions, so it's easier to manage the colonies while reducing the risk of escape. But could superworms match the cleaning efficiency of their rival beetles?Read full article

Child Abuse: ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁ ଡେ-କେୟାରରେ ଶିଶୁଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଅକଥନୀୟ ନିର୍ଯାତନା
description:
ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁ: ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁର ଏକ ଡେ-କେୟାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଦୁଇରୁ ତିନି ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର ଶିଶୁମାନଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଅମାନବୀୟ ନିର୍ଯାତନା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ସହ ଜଡ଼ିତ କିଛି ଭିଡିଓ ସାମାଜିକ ଗଣମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଭାଇରାଲ ହେବା ପରେ ପୁଲିସ ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି। ଏହି ଡେ-କେୟାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରଟି ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁର ଏଚ୍‌ଏଏଲ୍‌ ପରିସରରେ ଥିବା କ୍ୟାପ୍‌ଜେମିନି କମ୍ପାନି କ୍ୟାମ୍ପସ ଭିତରେ ପରିଚାଳିତ ହେଉଥିଲା। ଘଟଣାରେ ଶିଶୁମାନଙ୍କ ଯତ୍ନ ନେଉଥିବା ୫ ଜଣ ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ପୁଲିସ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରିଛି।
ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଅନୁସାରେ, କାନ୍ଦୁଥିବା ଶିଶୁମାନଙ୍କୁ ଚୁପ୍ କରାଇବା ପାଇଁ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ସାମ୍ନାପଟୁ ଖୋଲୁଥିବା ୱାସିଂ ମେସିନ୍‌ର ଡ୍ରମ୍‌ ଭିତରେ ବସାଇ ଦିଆଯାଉଥିଲା। ଏଥିସହ ଟଏଲେଟ୍‌ର ଜେଟ୍‌ ସ୍ପ୍ରେରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମୁହଁରେ ପାଣି ଛିଞ୍ଚାଯାଉଥିଲା। ବେଳେବେଳେ ପିଲାଙ୍କୁ ବାଥ୍‌ରୁମ୍‌ ଭିତରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରି ରଖାଯାଉଥିଲା। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓ ପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇବା ପରେ ଅଭିଭାବକମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଗଭୀର ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ ଓ ଚିନ୍ତା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁସାରେ, ଡେ-କେୟାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ନିଜ ସନ୍ତାନଙ୍କୁ ରଖି କ୍ୟାପ୍‌ଜେମିନିରେ କାମ କରୁଥିବା କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ଏହି ଘଟଣାରେ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଅଧିକ ମର୍ମାହତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ସେମାନେ ଶିଶୁମାନଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ଡେ-କେୟାର ଉପରେ ଭରସା କରିଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଏଭଳି ଅଭିଯୋଗ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ କର୍ପୋରେଟ୍‌ କ୍ୟାମ୍ପସ ଭିତରେ ଚାଲୁଥିବା ଶିଶୁ ଯତ୍ନ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଓ ନିରୀକ୍ଷଣ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀକୁ ନେଇ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଉଠିଛି। ଘଟଣା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିବା ପରେ ପୁଲିସରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଦାଖଲ ହେବା ସହ କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକ ରାଜ୍ୟ ଶିଶୁ ଅଧିକାର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଆୟୋଗରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପୃଥକ୍ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରାଯାଇଛି। ପୁଲିସ ଭାଇରାଲ ଭିଡିଓର ସତ୍ୟତା ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବା ସହ ଘଟଣାର ସମସ୍ତ ଦିଗକୁ ନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଚଳାଇଛି। ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ୫ ଜଣ ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଆଇନଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିବାବେଳେ ଘଟଣାଟି ଦେଶବ୍ୟାପୀ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚାର ବିଷୟ ପାଲଟିଛି। ଡେ-କେୟାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ କଡ଼ା ନିରୀକ୍ଷଣ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଲାଗୁ କରିବାକୁ ଅଭିଭାବକ ଓ ଶିଶୁ ଅଧିକାର କର୍ମୀମାନେ ଦାବି କରିଛନ୍ତି।

title: US Navy Helicopter Crashes in Arabian Sea Where Fleet is Operating for Iran War
description: Three of the helicopter's four crew members were rescued and are in stable condition aboard the USS George H.W. Bush
content: A US Navy airman is missing after an MH-60S Sea Hawk helicopter made an emergency water landing in the Arabian Sea early on Wednesday, US military officials said. The helicopter, assigned to the aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush, was forced to land in the water at about 03:30 local time, according to a statement from the US 5th Fleet.American forces in ⁠the region are also on high alert amid periodic flare-ups in violence ⁠during the ceasefire betweenUS and Iran. Three of the helicopter's four crew members were rescued and are in stable condition aboard the USS George H.W. Bush, officials said. A search operation is continuing for the fourth crew member. USS George HW Bush has been deployed in the Middle East since late April and is one of two US aircraft carriers currently operating in the region. Although the United States has ended its blockade on vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, it continues to maintain a significant military presence in the region."There is no indication the emergency was caused by hostile action," the US 5th Fleet said in a post on X. In a separate statement, US Naval Forces Central Command said: "Three of the helicopter's four crew members have been recovered and are in stable condition aboard George H.W. Bush. US Navy assets in the region are currently searching for [the] other aircrewman still missing." The cause of the emergency water landing has not been disclosed, and the incident remains under investigation. This is a Breaking Story and will be updated soon

title: Alpha Preview: Cast Fees, Shoot Locations, CBFC Rating, Runtime - All About Alia Bhatt, Sharvari Film
description: Alia Bhatt and Sharvari's new film, Alpha, is set to release in theatres on July 3. Ahead of its release, here are five things you need to know. From cast fees, to shoot locations, take a look.
content: The countdown to Alia Bhatt and Sharvari’s spy thriller, Alpha, has begun. It is the first female-driven action film in the YRF Spy Universe. Alia and Sharvari enter the franchise; they’re joined by Anil Kapoor and Bobby Deol. Unlike the previous movies, Alpha is the first assassin origin story, and it is expected to lead to the future titles lined up in the universe. The Shiv Rawail directorial has cleared the censor board stage and will be opening its first show on Friday. Ahead of Alpha’s release, here are five things you need to know about the film.Alpha Cast FeeContrary to early reports, Alia Bhatt has opted for a hybrid model, which means she has taken a nominal fee from Yash Raj Productions and the remaining amount will be based on the profits made by the film. Sharvari has reportedly taken Rs 3 crore. Anil Kapoor and Bobby Deol have been paid Rs 6 crore each, as per reports.Alpha Run TimeAccording to the Central Board of Film Certification’s official website, Alpha’s final run time is 140.48 minutes, which is 2 hours, 20 minutes and 48 seconds.Alpha CBFC CutsWhile the Central Board of Film Certification cleared Alpha with a U/A certificate, the makers were asked to tone down violent scenes and replace some of them with alternate sequences. The intensity of stabbing scenes had to undergo changes. A foul word in the first half of the film was asked to be removed.Alpha PlotAs per the Central Board of Film Certification’s website, Alpha’s synopsis is: Driven by revenge, a young girl destroys anyone in her path until her journey uncovers the hidden truths of her own life. She is bold, cold, and ready to cross any line, hurting anyone who stands in her way.Alpha Shoot LocationsAlpha has also been filmed at real locations. Action sequences and face-offs were shot within a studio in Mumbai. Alia and Sharvari were in Sonamarg and Pahalgam in Kashmir for important scenes. The film was also shot in Scotland and Poland.Fan theories around Sharvari's characterVarious fan theories are making the rounds on the internet after Hrithik Roshan’s cameo in the trailer went viral. Sharvari’s character details are kept under wraps, and netizens believe she is Vaani Kapoor’s daughter Ruhi, whose guardian is Major Kabir Dhaliwal, played by Hrithik in the War franchise.

Sony announces end of PlayStation discs, parts of digital store in the same day
description: “We will own nothing, it's truly sad.”
content:
Some gamers are concerned about the future of game ownership after Sony's announcement today that it won’t produce physical discs for PlayStation games as of January 2028. On that date, “new games will be available on PlayStation Store and at retailers in digital formats only,” Sony said in a blog post.
Ditching discs is “a natural direction” for Sony “to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs," the post said.
During Sony’s fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026, digital downloads accounted for 78 percent of full-game unit purchases, up from 76 percent in fiscal 2024.Read full article

title: Harry Kane Breaks Pele Record; Goes Way Past Cristiano Ronaldo After Match-Winning Brace Vs DR Congo
description: England secured their spot in the Round of 16 of the FIFA World Cup 2026 with a thrilling comeback victory over DR Congo. Harry Kane played a pivotal role, scoring both goals and surpassing Pele's World Cup tally.
content: England have just booked their place in the Round of 16 of the FIFA World Cup 2026, as they go one step ahead in achieving their first trophy since 1966, with a dramatic come-from-behind win against a spirited DR Congo side in the Round of 32 match at the Atlanta Stadium on July 1 (Thursday). This massive win has come courtesy a masterclass of a performance from their captain and talisman Harry Kane, who once again proved to be the man for all seasons for the Three Lions. With his brace against DR Congo, Kane has now broken a record tally of the legendary Pele.Harry Kane has now scored 13 goals at the FIFA World Cup and gone past Pele as the joint 6th-highest scorer in the tournament's history. He has gone past Brazilian legend Pele, who has scored 12 goals in a legendary career, where he led Brazil to three World Cup trophies. In contrast, Cristiano Ronaldo has a total of 10 goals in the competition.Here are the all-time highest goalscorers in FIFA World Cup history:Lionel Messi—19 goals Kylian Mbappé—18 goals Miroslav Klose—16 goals  Ronaldo—15 goals Gerd Müller—14 goals Just Fontaine—13 goals Harry Kane—13 goals  Pelé—12 goalsMultiple Records Achieved By Harry KaneHarry Kane has now scored 72 goals for club and country in the 2025/26 season. This includes 9 goals for England and a whopping 61 for his club Bayern Munich across all competitions. This is now the second most goals ever scored by a player in a single season for club and country. Lionel Messi still holds the record for scoring the most goals in a single season, netting 82 goals in 2011/12.Harry Kane is the second player ever to score 70 goals in a single season. Cristiano Ronaldo's highest goal-scoring season was 69.Kane is also the first England player to score multiple goals in a knockout match of a World Cup, and also the highest scorer for the country in knockouts of the tournament with 7 strikes to his name.England Come Back After Early Scare By DR CongoIt was a poor start for England, as DR Congo provided them with an early scare, as Brian Cipenga scored his first international goal ever to open the scoring and give the African nation a lead in the 7th minute.After that, England struggled to score as DR Congo remained resolute in defence. It was in the 76th minute that Harry Kane finally broke the shackles for England and scored a well-placed header to give them an equalizer. The England captain struck again from a well-made England move courtesy of Jude Bellingham and Anthony Gordon, with a sensational strike, to give England a lead in the 86th minute. This proved to be the winner as England finally won the match by 2-1. They will now face Mexico in the Round of 16 at Mexico City.

title: Iran US Israel war Live Updates: Agreement Reached Between US-Iran To Release $3 Billion Worth Frozen Iranian Assets, Say Reports
description: US-Iran War Live Updates: Follow real-time developments as the United States and Iran attempt to preserve a fragile ceasefire through renewed diplomatic engagement, even as military tensions continue across the Middle East. Track the latest updates on the Doha talks, the Strait of Hormuz, regional security, humanitarian developments and the wider geopolitical impact of the conflict.Trump Announces Fresh Doha Talks: US President Donald Trump said American and Iranian officials would meet in Doha after Tehran allegedly requested fresh negotiations. The meeting is aimed at advancing the implementation of the recently signed memorandum of understanding and preventing a return to open conflict.Iran Denies Formal Negotiations: Iran quickly disputed Trump's announcement, with senior negotiator Kazem Gharibabadi stating that no formal technical negotiations had been scheduled. Tehran said consultations with Qatar on implementing the agreement were continuing but reports of new talks were "not confirmed".US Confirms High-Level Delegation: The White House later clarified that Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and senior adviser Jared Kushner would travel to Doha for high-level discussions. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said technical discussions would take place alongside broader diplomatic meetings.Frozen Iranian Assets On Agenda: Iran's Foreign Ministry said it would send an expert delegation to Doha to follow up on the release of frozen Iranian assets, including the reported release of $6 billion held in Qatar. Neither Washington nor Doha has officially confirmed the transfer.Pezeshkian Hails Interim Agreement: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian described the interim agreement as "a great victory for the Iranian people", arguing that it had secured important economic and diplomatic gains while opening the door for broader negotiations.Strait Of Hormuz Remains Flashpoint: Tehran rejected France's proposal to support de-mining operations in the Strait of Hormuz, warning Paris against what it described as provocations in an already sensitive security environment. The strategic waterway remains central to negotiations after months of disruption to global shipping.Maritime Security Continues To Raise Concerns: Recent attacks on commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, including reports of an alleged Iranian strike on a cargo vessel, have renewed concerns that the fragile ceasefire could unravel if maritime security deteriorates further.Israel Continues Military Operations: Despite the broader diplomatic process, Israeli forces continued military operations in both Gaza and southern Lebanon. At least eight Palestinians were reported killed in Gaza, while fresh strikes were also reported across southern Lebanon despite the ceasefire agreement with Beirut.Trump Says US Honouring Ceasefire: The White House maintained that Washington continues to uphold its commitments under the interim agreement but warned that any renewed violence would be met with a military response, reflecting the fragile nature of the current truce.Energy Markets Watch Diplomatic Progress: The interim agreement signed on June 17 was designed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and provide a 60-day window for broader negotiations. Any disruption to implementation could once again threaten one of the world's most important energy corridors, through which roughly one-fifth of global oil and liquefied natural gas shipments normally pass.Trump Credits Deal For Falling Oil Prices: President Trump claimed the diplomatic breakthrough had contributed to lower global oil prices and declining fuel costs, arguing that market confidence had improved following the ceasefire and reopening of maritime routes.Fragile Peace Enters Critical Stage: Although both Washington and Tehran continue to pursue diplomatic engagement, conflicting public statements, unresolved disputes over implementation and ongoing military activity across the region underscore how fragile the peace process remains. The Doha discussions are expected to play a key role in determining whether the ceasefire evolves into a lasting settlement.

title: Aaj Ka Rashifal 02 July 2026: सिंह-कन्या को मिलेगा लाभ, धनु-मकर रहें सतर्क, पढ़ें सभी 12 राशियों का राशिफल
description: Aaj Ka Rashifal 02 July 2026: जानिए कैसा रहेगा गुरूवार का दिन। किसे मिलेगा अटका धन और कमोडिटी बाजार में गेहूं, चना व तेल के भावों का सटीक समय चक्र के साथ व्यापारिक अनुमान।
content:
Aaj Ka Rashifal 02 July 2026: ज्योतिष शास्त्र के अनुसार गुरुवार का दिन कई राशियों के लिए नई संभावनाएं लेकर आने वाला है। जहां एक ओर कई राशियों को करियर में सफलता मिलेगी तो किसी खास राशि को आर्थिक मामलों में सतर्क रहने की जरूरत होगी। आइए जानते हैं मेष से मीन तक सभी 12 राशियों का दैनिक राशिफल और आज का व्यापार भविष्य।
1 जुलाई 2026 को सभी राशियों का राशिफल
मेष
मेष राशि के जातकों के लिए जीवनसाथी के साथ मतभेद हो सकते हैं। प्रॉपर्टी संबंधी विवाद के समाधान की संभावना है। आजीविका के प्रयासों में उन्नति होगी और आत्मविश्वास बना रहेगा।
वृषभ
वृषभ राशि के जातकों के लिए पारिवारिक अपेक्षाओं को पूरा करने में कठिनाई आ सकती है, जिससे परिजन नाराज हो सकते हैं। मित्रों का सहयोग लाभदायक रहेगा। यात्रा के दौरान सावधानी बरतें।
मिथुन
मिथुन राशि के जातकों के लिए कार्यक्षेत्र में अप्रत्याशित सफलता मिलने के योग हैं। हाथ में लिया गया कार्य पूरा होगा। खानपान पर नियंत्रण रखें, अन्यथा पेट संबंधी परेशानी हो सकती है।
कर्क
कर्क राशि के जातकों के लिए सामाजिक कार्यक्रमों में आपकी उपस्थिति नई ऊर्जा का संचार करेगी। नए कार्य की शुरुआत हो सकती है। मनोरंजन के साधनों में वृद्धि होगी। संयम बनाए रखें।
सिंह
सिंह राशि के जातकों के लिए बेहतर भविष्य के लिए महत्वपूर्ण निर्णय लेने पड़ सकते हैं। स्वास्थ्य का विशेष ध्यान रखें। अतिथियों का आगमन होगा। मान-सम्मान और लाभ मिलने के योग हैं।
कन्या
कन्या राशि के जातकों के लिए खानपान में लापरवाही से स्वास्थ्य प्रभावित हो सकता है। नौकरी में तरक्की के संकेत हैं। संतान संबंधी कार्यों और रचनात्मक क्षेत्रों में सफलता मिलेगी।
तुला
तुला राशि के जातकों के लिए अधिकारियों से कार्य संबंधी सकारात्मक आश्वासन मिलेगा। जल्दबाजी में कोई निर्णय न लें। निर्माण संबंधी कार्यों में प्रगति होगी।
वृश्चिक
वृश्चिक राशि के जातकों के लिए आप दूसरों की सहायता के लिए तत्पर रहेंगे। साहस और पराक्रम में वृद्धि होगी। सामाजिक कार्यों में रुचि बढ़ेगी। मित्रों का सहयोग मिलेगा।
धनु
धनु राशि के जातकों के लिए प्रस्तावित योजनाओं में बाधाएं आ सकती हैं। सुनी-सुनाई बातों पर भरोसा न करें। मित्रों और परिवार के सहयोग से आर्थिक समस्याओं का समाधान होगा।
मकर
मकर राशि के जातकों के लिए नए लोगों से संपर्क करते समय सावधानी बरतें। विश्वास में लेकर कोई धोखा दे सकता है। मांगलिक कार्यों पर खर्च होगा। मनोरंजन के अवसर बढ़ेंगे।
कुंभ
कुंभ राशि के जातकों के लिए घरेलू उलझनें मानसिक तनाव का कारण बन सकती हैं। नकारात्मक सोच से बनता हुआ काम बिगड़ सकता है। कड़ी मेहनत से सफलता मिलेगी।
मीन
मीन राशि के जातकों के लिए रिश्तों को मधुर बनाए रखने का प्रयास करेंगे। कुछ लोग आपके विश्वास का अनुचित लाभ उठाने की कोशिश कर सकते हैं। योजनाबद्ध तरीके से किए गए कार्यों में सफलता मिलेगी।
ये भी पढ़ें :-  Aaj Ka Rashifal 30 June 2026: मंगलवार को इन राशियों पर बरसेगी कृपा, जानें मेष से मीन तक का पूरा भविष्यफल
व्यापार भविष्य
आषाढ़ कृष्ण द्वितीया एवं उत्तराषाढ़ा नक्षत्र के प्रभाव से गुड़, खांड, जौ, गेहूं, चना, रूई, कपास, चांदी और सोने के भाव में मंदी रहने की संभावना है। वहीं जीरा और धनिया के भाव सामान्य रह सकते हैं। वायदा कारोबार में सुबह 11:10 बजे से 11:20 बजे के बीच बाजार की चाल देखकर व्यापार करना लाभदायक रहेगा।

title: Trump Clashes With Reporter Over Crypto Profit: 'Made A Lot of Money Before Being President'
description: Donald Trump 'pushed back' a reporter who was questioning the US President's crypto profits after he disclosed recent earnings of $1.4 billion.
content: Donald Trump 'pushed back' a reporter who was questioning the US President's crypto profits after he disclosed recent earnings of $1.4 billion. President Trump said that "everybody is profiting" because of the stock market, adding he had a good career even before being the President.When questioned by the reporter about whether he (Trump) was allegedly "profiting off the presidency,” Trump responded, saying, "everybody's profiting" due to the surging stock market.As the reporter continued questioning the President over his crypto profits, Trump turned the question around on the journalist, asking, "Do you have a 401k? How's your 401k done? It's about up 85%. 'Thank you, President Trump!'"

title: Empire State Building Climbers: Angela Nikolau and Ivan Beerkus Identified as Duo Behind Daring Stunt
description: The message on the banner is a slightly modified version of a quote that is frequently attributed to guitarist Jimi Hendrix but was originally spoken by 19th-century British Prime Minister William Gladstone.
content: Russian urban climbers Angela Nikolau and Ivan Beerkus have identified themselves as the pair who scaled the antenna of New York City's Empire State Building before becoming engaged during the descent. The couple, both dressed in black, climbed to the top of the landmark's 1,454-foot spire on Wednesday, where they unfurled a banner reading: "When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace."The message on the banner is a slightly modified version of a quote that is frequently attributed to guitarist Jimi Hendrix but was originally spoken by 19th-century British Prime Minister William Gladstone. Video from the scene showed the climbers remaining at the top of the structure for about 30 minutes before descending towards a platform at the base of the antenna. The building's observation deck appeared to have been evacuated during the incident.            BREAKING: Two people climbed atop the Empire State Building’s 1,454-foot spire and unfurled a banner reading, “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace.” Police are working to bring them down safely. pic.twitter.com/XbbVA7kuY5— Breaking911 (@Breaking911) July 1, 2026After lingering at the top of the tower for around 30 minutes, the climbers began making their way down the spire to the viewing platform, which appears to have been evacuated. According to a report by The New York Post, as the couple reached a platform at the base of the spire, Beerkus dropped down on one knee and proposed to Nikolau — who was wearing a black cat mask — with a ring that she later flaunted on Instagram.The couple was taken into custody without incident upon reaching the ground and charges are pending, according to the NYPD. It was not immediately clear if they bought tickets to access the observation deck, but a source familiar told The Post they allegedly breached a mesh gate on the 102nd floor — a publicly accessible floor — to reach the 103rd floor, which gave them access to the spire.    An Empire State Building spokesperson told The New York Post: "The unauthorized incident at the building has been resolved with the constructive and helpful coordination of the NYPD. There was at no time danger to tenants, visitors, and Empire State Building Observation Deck guests."Footage of their daring stunt from the top of the Empire State Building was also posted on Nikolau's Instagram page, who describes herself as a "neoartist exploring identify, fear & freedom."The incident is not without precedent. In 1994, French climber Alain Robert, widely known as the "French Spider-Man", scaled the Empire State Building using only his hands and feet before being arrested by the New York Police Department.

title: Abhishek Sharma's 'Kya Kar Raha Hai?' After Ishan Kishan's Bizarre Run-Out Goes Viral - WATCH
description: The Indian cricket team faced an early setback at 6/2 after Sanju Samson was dismissed and Ishan Kishan was run out due to a miscommunication with Abhishek Sharma.
content: Shreyas Iyer-led Indian cricket team's top-order problem continued as they faced Harry Brook's England in the first T20I of the five-match series on Wednesday at Chester-le-Street. The Men in Blue stumbled at 6/2 in the first two overs after Saqib Mahmood dismissed Sanju Samson in the second over, and Ishan Kishan joined him back in the dugout just two balls later due to a terrible mix-up in the middle. The visitors were put under early pressure when Kishan's outing ended in a frustrating run-out. Ishan Kishan's Run OutIshan had called for a fast single, but Abhishek quickly realised there was no run because he kept his eyes on the ball and even gestured the wicket-keeper batter to go back. However, he seemed to have missed it as his eyes were on the ball. When Kishan was halfway through, Abhishek yelled from the non-striker's end, "Are yaar kya kar raha hai (What are you doing)?", which is now going viral across social media.Kishan was left stranded in the middle of the second over due to the mix-up, and England's fielders responded quickly to finish the dismissal. India's momentum at the top took a big hit when the wicketkeeper-batter was removed for a two-ball duck.India Post 189/7 vs ENGAbhishek Sharma saved India with a powerful innings against England and helped them recover from early setbacks. The left-hander cruised his innings after early setbacks and used effortless strokeplay to stabilise the innings under trying circumstances. After Ishan Kishan and Sanju Samson were dismissed cheaply, Abhishek seized control and started attacking Saqib Mahmood and Liam Dawson to change the tide.Abhishek's quickfire 59 off just 24 balls, followed by Shreyas Iyer's steady 68 off 47 and Shivam Dube's blazing 42 off just 21 balls helped the Indian team post 189/7. Now it will be up to their bowlers to restrict the English batters under it.

title: All four members of Venezuelan nu-metal band Van Der Dijs killed in earthquakes
description:
The group were in their rehearsal space in the north of the country at the time of the disaster
The post All four members of Venezuelan nu-metal band Van Der Dijs killed in earthquakes appeared first on NME.
content:
All four members of Venezuelan nu-metal band Van Der Dijs have died following the devastating earthquakes that struck the country last week.
The band – vocalist Manuel van Der Dijs, guitarist Gabriel Gómez, bassist Xander Hernández and drummer Abraham Foucault – were killed after the building where they were rehearsing in La Guaira collapsed.
According to Venezuelan outlet Últimas Noticias, the group were inside the Costamar II building in Tanaguarena when the area was hit by two powerful earthquakes.
Their bodies were later recovered from the rubble by rescue teams.
The earthquakes, which struck northern Venezuela on June 24, registered magnitudes of 7.2 and 7.5 and caused widespread destruction across the country. More than 1,900 people have been confirmed dead, with thousands more injured and many still missing.
Van Der Dijs were an emerging band in Venezuela’s heavy music scene, blending nu-metal, rap-rock and alternative elements.

The group had been building momentum in recent months and had been due to play further shows in Venezuela, including dates in Punto Fijo and Valencia.
They had recently played a sold-out show at the Centro de Arte Moderno in La Castellana, Caracas, on June 19, just days before the earthquakes, and their official Instagram page had also been promoting upcoming dates in around the country.
The earthquakes have left Venezuela facing a major humanitarian crisis, with hospitals overwhelmed, widespread structural damage and rescue teams continuing to search through collapsed buildings.
La Guaira, the coastal state where the band died, has been among the areas worst affected by the disaster.
The country has also been hit by aftershocks in the days since the initial earthquakes, while international aid and rescue teams have been sent to assist with the response.
The post All four members of Venezuelan nu-metal band Van Der Dijs killed in earthquakes appeared first on NME.

title: A good little EV you won't be able to buy soon: The Volvo EX30 Cross Country
description: Tariffs and anti-China policies killed this little Volvo in the United States.
content:
Did you know the average new vehicle in the US grew an inch (25 mm) wider and 22 inches (558 mm) longer between 2013 and 2023? That's probably obvious to anyone who steps foot outside these days, and it's a trend that we ought to reverse. Bigger cars might make their occupants feel more secure, but they invariably need more energy to get where they're going. And with f=ma being what it is, bigger vehicles tend to leave a lasting and deleterious effect on anything unlucky enough to be the other party in a collision. That makes today's tale a rather bittersweet one, because the Volvo EX30 could be the perfect antidote.
It's a compact and efficient electric crossover with a tiny carbon footprint but no compromises on safety, and it would be perfect for the current moment, except that Volvo recently decided to stop importing the car to the US. With the order books now closed, once the ~1,200-odd cars left in inventory are gone, they're gone.
After teasing us for a while, Volvo finally showed off the EX30 for real in 2023. At the time, the headline news was its price: $34,950 for the rear-wheel drive version before any tax credit. That would have made it one of the cheaper EVs available for sale in the US, but with Volvo's premium badge attached. That was before geopolitics got involved.Read full article

'Biggest corporate investment...': Trump hails Micron's $250 million investment announcement in Trump accounts
description: President Donald Trump praised Micron's $250 million investment in Trump Accounts, calling it the largest corporate commitment of its kind. The initiative aims to expand long-term savings opportunities for American children and families.
content: US President Donald Trump hailed Micron Technology's announcement of a $250 million investment in Trump Accounts, calling it the "biggest corporate investment of its kind." In a post on Truth Social, Trump said the initiative would help millions of American children and families while describing it as evidence that his economic policies are delivering results.Micron Technology announced a $250 million investment in Trump Accounts (also known as 530A Accounts) to expand long-term savings opportunities for children and families as part of the celebrations marking America's 250th anniversary.As part of the initiative, the chipmaker will introduce an employee matching benefit, matching contributions of up to $1,000 per child under the age of 18. The company will also make a one-time $250 seed deposit into Trump Accounts for eligible children in communities where it operates across Idaho, New York, Virginia, California, Colorado, Minnesota and Texas.Most of the funding will be directed toward children and families in communities where Micron has operations, with the aim of expanding long-term financial opportunities for the next generation.The initiative complements Micron's previously announced more than $200 billion investment in US memory manufacturing and research and development (R&D), which the company said will create over 90,000 jobs in the United States. Micron said the combined investments underscore its long-term commitment to strengthening the country's semiconductor ecosystem and the workforce that supports it.What Trump said?Trump welcomed Micron Technology's announcement of a $250 million investment in Trump Accounts, calling it the "biggest corporate investment of its kind" and saying it would support American children and families."Micron, a truly GREAT American Company, and one of the “HOTTEST” anywhere in the World, has announced a HISTORIC $250 MILLION Investment in TRUMP ACCOUNTS. This incredible gesture, made by Micron’s fantastic CEO, Sanjay Mehrotra, will make many children extremely happy some day in the not too distant future," wrote Trump on Truth Social.  "This is the BIGGEST CORPORATE Investment of its kind, and will help jumpstart the American Dream for these fabulous children as we celebrate America's 250th Anniversary! This MASSIVE Investment will help MILLIONS of American children and families get a strong start in life, and give them REAL Financial Security. Micron is investing directly in the American Worker and Family! This is exactly what the fabulously successful TRUMP ACCOUNTS were created to do — Give every American Child a headstart, and a real chance to succeed. My Policies are WORKING, and working “BIG.” Our Country is doing far better than any country, anywhere in the World, and Companies like Micron are proving it every single day. THIS IS THE GOLDEN AGE OF AMERICA!" he said.

title: EXCLUSIVE: राजधानी भोपाल में रिहायशी इलाकों के बीच गौस गोदाम, फायर सेफ्टी के नाम पर फेल व्यवस्थाएं- VIDEO
description: Ground Report: भोपाल में रिहायशी इलाकों के बीच मौत का सामान, अशोका गार्डन और ओल्ड सुभाष नगर में गैस गोदामों का अवैध संचालन, वसूली जा रही जबरन डिलीवरी फीस, सर्वे शुरू।
content:
Bhopal LPG Agencies Flaws: राजधानी भोपाल के अशोका गार्डन, गोविंदपुरा और ओल्ड सुभाष नगर जैसे घनी आबादी वाले इलाकों में एलपीजी गैस सिलेंडरों के गोदाम सालों से संचालित हो रहे हैं। आरोप है कि कई गोदाम रहवासी क्षेत्र के बीच चल रहे हैं, साथ ही सुरक्षा मानकों का पालन नहीं किया जा रहा।
नवभारत की पड़ताल में सबसे गंभीर मामला ओल्ड सुभाष नगर स्थित प्रदीप गैस एजेंसी के गोदाम का सामने आया है, जहां मंदिर और घनी आबादी के बीच गैस सिलेंडरों का भंडारण किया जा रहा है। जांच के दौरान सामने आई तस्वीरों के अनुसार कई जगहों पर फर्श मानकों के अनुरूप नहीं मिला, फायर सेफ्टी की पर्याप्त व्यवस्था नहीं दिखी और सुरक्षा गाइडलाइन की अनदेखी के आरोप लगे। इसके बावजूद संबंधित विभागों की ओर से कोई सख्त कार्रवाई नहीं होने के आरोप लगाए जा रहे हैं।
अशोका गार्डन जैसे इलाके में 300 सिलेंडरों वाला गोदाम
गौरतलब है कि, अशोका गार्डन जैसे क्षेत्र घनी आबादी वाले इलाके में 300 सिलेंडरों के स्टॉक वाला गोदाम है। जब नवभारत की टीम यहां पहुंचे तो तस्वीर हैरान करने वाली दिखी। इस एजेंसी पर भी शासन की गाइडलाइंस की धज्जियां उड़ती देखी गईं। गोदाम संचालक ने बताया कि उनके पास गोदाम संचालित करने के लिए खाद्य विभाग और बीपीसीएल की अनुमति है। हालांकि जब उनसे अनुमति की प्रति दिखाने के लिए कहा गया तो उन्होंने कोई दस्तावेज नहीं दिखाया और बात को टाल दिया।
होम डिलीवरी चार्ज में भी हो रही गड़बड़
जांच के दौरान एक और बड़ा सवाल सामने आया। कई गैस एजेंसियों पर उपभोक्ताओं को घरेलू गैस सिलेंडर लेने के लिए खुद एजेंसी बुलाया जा रहा है लेकिन इसके बावजूद उनसे होम डिलीवरी चार्ज भी वसूला जा रहा है। उपभोक्ताओं का कहना है कि जब वह स्वयं एजेंसी से सिलेंडर लेकर जाते हैं तो डिलीवरी चार्ज हटाकर बाकी राशि ली जानी चाहिए लेकिन अधिकांश एजेंसियों पर ग्राहकों से करीब 947.50 रुपये की पूरी राशि ही वसूली जा रही है, जिसमें लगभग 35 रुपये डिलीवरी चार्ज भी शामिल बताया जा रहा है।
यह भी पढ़ें: बुरहानपुर में कीचड़ में बैठे पार्षद: जलभराव के विरोध में &#8216;जल आंदोलन&#8217;, महापौर के खिलाफ जमकर नारेबाजी
इन गोदामों का सर्वे कराया जाएगा- भोपाल कलेक्टर
इस मामले में जब भोपाल कलेक्टर से बात की तब उन्होंने कहा कि इन गोदामों में जिन अनियमितताओं की शिकायत की बात की जा रही है, उसे लेकर सर्वे कराया जाएगा। अब सवाल यह है कि जब राजधानी के घनी आबादी वाले इलाकों में इतने वर्षों से ये गैस गोदाम संचालित हो रहे हैं, तो क्या संबंधित विभागों ने अपनी आंखें और कान बंद कर रखे हैं? यदि किसी गोदाम में लापरवाही के कारण कोई बड़ा हादसा होता है तो उसकी जिम्मेदारी कौन लेगा? क्या इसकी जिम्मेदारी शासन-प्रशासन की होगी या फिर गोदाम संचालकों की? वहीं दूसरी ओर उपभोक्ताओं से डिलीवरी सेवा दिए बिना डिलीवरी चार्ज वसूले जाने के आरोप भी व्यवस्था की पारदर्शिता पर गंभीर सवाल खड़े कर रहे हैं।

title: सलमान खान की क्रिएटिविटी का खुला राज, ‘दबंग 3’ के डायलॉग्स और वन-लाइनर्स खुद करते थे इम्प्रोवाइज
description: Salman Khan Dabangg 3 Dialogues: फिल्म निर्माता निखिल द्विवेदी ने खुलासा किया कि दबंग 3 में सलमान खान सिर्फ लीड एक्टर नहीं थे, बल्कि डायलॉग्स, वन-लाइनर्स और म्यूजिक में भी उनका अहम क्रिएटिव योगदान था।
content:
Salman Khan Dabangg 3: बॉलीवुड सुपरस्टार सलमान खान को अक्सर उनकी दमदार स्क्रीन प्रेजेंस और स्टारडम के लिए जाना जाता है, लेकिन बहुत कम लोग जानते हैं कि वह फिल्मों के क्रिएटिव प्रोसेस में भी सक्रिय भूमिका निभाते हैं। हाल ही में फिल्म निर्माता निखिल द्विवेदी ने ‘दबंग 3’ को लेकर एक ऐसा खुलासा किया है, जिसने सलमान के फैंस को उत्साहित कर दिया है।
निखिल के मुताबिक, सलमान सिर्फ फिल्म के लीड एक्टर नहीं थे, बल्कि डायलॉग्स, वन-लाइनर्स और म्यूजिक जैसे कई अहम पहलुओं में भी उनकी महत्वपूर्ण भागीदारी थी। हाल ही में दिए एक इंटरव्यू में निखिल द्विवेदी ने बताया कि ‘दबंग 3’ की शूटिंग के दौरान कई ऐसे मौके आए, जब सलमान खान ने खुद फिल्म के लिए मजेदार वन-लाइनर्स और डायलॉग्स सुझाए।
सेट पर खुद तैयार होते थे कई डायलॉग्स
निखिल द्विवेदी ने कहा कि फिल्म की कई चीजें स्क्रिप्ट तक सीमित नहीं थीं, बल्कि शूटिंग के दौरान कलाकारों और पूरी टीम की क्रिएटिविटी से उन्हें और बेहतर बनाया गया। ऐसे प्रोजेक्ट पर काम करना बेहद दिलचस्प होता है क्योंकि बहुत कुछ सेट पर ही विकसित होता रहता है। कई डायलॉग्स वहीं इम्प्रोवाइज किए जाते हैं और पूरी टीम अपने-अपने आइडियाज जोड़ती है। सलमान खान बेहद क्रिएटिव इंसान हैं।
म्यूजिक में भी निभाई अहम भूमिका
निखिल द्विवेदी ने यह भी खुलासा किया कि सलमान खान का योगदान सिर्फ संवादों तक सीमित नहीं था। फिल्म के संगीत को लेकर भी उनकी राय काफी अहम होती थी। उन्होंने बताया कि सलमान गानों की प्रस्तुति और म्यूजिक से जुड़े कई सुझाव देते थे, जिससे फिल्म को और बेहतर बनाने में मदद मिली। निखिल के मुताबिक, सलमान खान के साथ काम करना हमेशा एक यादगार और रचनात्मक अनुभव रहता है।
ये भी पढ़ें- ‘वेलकम टू द जंगल’ का बॉक्स ऑफिस पर धमाका, छठे दिन 85 करोड़ के पार पहुंचकर बनाए 6 बड़े रिकॉर्ड
अलग सोच वाली फिल्मों पर लगा रहे हैं दांव
निखिल द्विवेदी इन दिनों बॉलीवुड के उन निर्माताओं में गिने जाते हैं, जो अलग-अलग विषयों और जॉनर की फिल्मों पर काम करने के लिए जाने जाते हैं। उन्होंने ‘वीरे दी वेडिंग’, ‘दबंग 3’, ‘CTRL’ और हालिया फिल्म ‘बंदर’ जैसी परियोजनाओं के जरिए अपनी अलग पहचान बनाई है। उनकी कोशिश हमेशा ऐसी कहानियां दर्शकों तक पहुंचाने की रही है, जो मनोरंजन के साथ नया अनुभव भी दें।

title: ৰাম মন্দিৰৰ ধন আত্মসাৎ: ৬ অভিযুক্তই জড়িত বাৰানসীৰ এটা সংস্থাৰে...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ অযোধ্যাৰ ৰাম মন্দিৰত দানৰ ধন আত্মসাতৰ অভিযোগৰ তদন্তত এক গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ তথ্য পোহৰলৈ আহিছে। তদন্তকাৰী বিষয়াসকলে জানিবলৈ দিছে যে গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ হোৱা ৮জন অভিযুক্তৰ ভিতৰত ৬জনক বাৰানসীস্থিত এটা ব্যক্তিগত নিৰাপত্তা সংস্থাৰ জৰিয়তে নিযুক্তি দিয়া হৈছিল। এই সংস্থাটোক মন্দিৰত সংগৃহীত দানৰ নগদ ধন গণনাৰ বাবে কৰ্মচাৰী যোগান ধৰিবলৈ নিযুক্ত কৰা হৈছিল।
মন্দিৰৰ দানৰ ধনৰ কোটি কোটি টকা আত্মসাৎ হোৱা বুলি উত্থাপিত অভিযোগৰ পাছত আৰম্ভ হোৱা এই গোচৰৰ তদন্ত বৰ্তমান এটা বিশেষ তদন্তকাৰী দলে অব্যাহত ৰাখিছে। অভিযুক্ত কেইজনক কেনেদৰে নিযুক্তি দিয়া হৈছিল, নগদ ধন গণনাৰ কামৰ তদাৰকী কোনে কৰিছিল আৰু ব্যৱস্থাত কোনো ত্ৰুটি আছিল নেকি, এই সকলো বিষয় তদন্তৰ আওতালৈ অনা হৈছে।
ৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় সংবাদমাধ্যমৰ খবৰ অনুসৰি, গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ হোৱা ৮জনৰ ভিতৰত ৬জনেই বাৰাণসীস্থিত সৈনিক ছিকিউৰিটী ছাৰ্ভিচ ৰ কৰ্মচাৰী আছিল। সংস্থাটোৱে ৰাম মন্দিৰত দান হিচাপে সংগৃহীত নগদ ধন গণনাৰ বাবে কৰ্মচাৰী যোগান ধৰিছিল বুলি জানিব পৰা গৈছে।
সংস্থাটোৰ সঞ্চালক গৌৰৱ সিঙে কয় যে- সংস্থাটোক পোনপটীয়াকৈ শ্ৰীৰাম জনমভূমি তীৰ্থ ক্ষেত্ৰ ট্ৰাষ্টে নিযুক্তি দিয়া নাছিল। তেওঁৰ দাবী কৰা মতে, অযোধ্যাৰ এছ বি আইৰ ‘নয়া ঘাট’ শাখাই নগদ ধন গণনাৰ বাবে কৰ্মচাৰী যোগান ধৰিবলৈ সংস্থাটোক অনুৰোধ কৰিছিল।
গৌৰৱ সিঙে লগতে কয় যে স্থানীয় SBI শাখাই ১৯জনীয়া এটা দল বিচাৰিছিল। সেই অনুসৰি সংস্থাটোৱে কৰ্মচাৰী নিযুক্তি দি অযোধ্যালৈ পঠিয়াইছিল। তেওঁলোকক প্ৰায় ২০ হাজাৰ টকা মাহিলী বেতন দিয়া হৈছিল।
ইফালে, SBIয়ে জনাইছে যে চলি থকা SIT তদন্তত বেংকে সম্পূৰ্ণ সহযোগিতা আগবঢ়াই আছে। ২০২৪ চনৰ জানুৱাৰীত ৰাম মন্দিৰৰ প্ৰাণ প্ৰতিষ্ঠাৰ পিছৰে পৰা ট্ৰাষ্টৰ বেংকিং সেৱা SBIয়ে পৰিচালনা কৰি আহিছে।
এজন জ্যেষ্ঠ SBI বিষয়াই জনোৱা মতে- সাধাৰণতে এনে ধৰণৰ কৰ্মচাৰী নিয়োগ কেন্দ্ৰীয় বা কৰ্পোৰেট পৰ্যায়ত সম্পন্ন হয়। কিন্তু এই ক্ষেত্ৰত স্থানীয় শাখাই নগদ ধন গণনাৰ বাবে কৰ্মচাৰী বিচাৰিছিল। আনহাতে, সৈনিক ছিকিউৰিটি ছাৰ্ভিচেছে কয় যে- বেংকৰ চাহিদা অনুসৰি কৰ্মচাৰী যোগান ধৰাৰ বাহিৰে সংস্থাটোৰ মন্দিৰ ট্ৰাষ্টৰ সৈতে কোনো প্ৰত্যক্ষ চুক্তিগত সম্পৰ্ক নাছিল। সংস্থাটোৱে দাবী কৰিছে যে- ই দেশৰ একাধিক ৰাজ্যত কাম কৰে আৰু বিভিন্ন চৰকাৰী সংস্থাকো সেৱা আগবঢ়ায়।
ৰাম মন্দিৰৰ দান-বৰঙণিৰ ধন আত্মসাতৰ অভিযোগত আৰক্ষীয়ে এতিয়ালৈকে ৮জন লোকক গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ কৰিছে। অভিযুক্তসকল হৈছে অনুকল্প মিশ্ৰ, লৱকুশ মিশ্ৰ, ৰামশংকৰ যাদৱ ওৰফে টিন্নু, মনীষ যাদৱ, সুভাষ শ্ৰীবাস্তৱ, অভিনাশ শুক্লা, ৰামশংকৰ মিশ্ৰ আৰু কৰুণেশ পাণ্ডে। ইফালে, তদন্তকাৰী দলটোৱে কৰা তালাচীৰ সময়ত আৰক্ষীয়ে ৭জন অভিযুক্তৰ পৰা প্ৰায় ৭৯.৮৫ লাখ টকা নগদ ধন উদ্ধাৰ কৰিছে।

title: Russia Turns To India For Gasoline As Ukraine's Drone Strikes Trigger Fuel Short...
description: Russia has initiated gasoline imports from India due to escalating fuel shortages caused by Ukrainian drone attacks on its energy infrastructure, a report suggests.
content: Russia has begun importing gasoline from India as fuel shortages spread across the country following repeated Ukrainian drone attacks on its energy infrastructure, marking a rare shift for one of the world's largest energy producers. Instead of exporting fuel, Russia is now looking overseas to keep its domestic market supplied.According to Reuters, Russia has started importing gasoline from India via sea routes in an effort to stabilise domestic fuel supplies after the attacks disrupted refining operations. Amid the ongoing Ukrainian attacks, Moscow is witnessing fuel shortages across the country's 11 time zones with rationing, long queues at filling stations and a record gasoline price increase.In view of the ongoing crisis, the Kremlin on Tuesday said that Russia was in contact with other countries and discussing imports of fuel at acceptable prices.Russia's energy ministry and India's oil ministry did not immediately respond to requests for comment.India Exports Gasoline To RussiaAt least 60,000 metric tons of gasoline have been dispatched from India to Russia, Reuters reported citing an industry source. Another source added that two tankers, with parcels of 30,000 to 40,000 tons each, have also been sent.The report, further quoting a third source, informed that Russia plans to import 400,000 tons of gasoline from various countries each month, including from neighbouring Belarus, which has already been exporting fuel to Russia.Notably, there is no information on which Indian refiner will be supplying gasoline to Russia.Earlier on Sunday, Russian President Vladimir Putin, during a meeting with government ministers and other ‌officials, acknowledged ⁠that Ukrainian drone strikes on oil refineries had triggered fuel shortages in some regions; however, Russia was dealing with them.(With agency inputs)

title: Jammu & Kashmir:  राज्य का दर्जा बहाल करने के लिए विपक्ष को साथ लाएगी नेशनल कॉन्फ्रेंस, सभी पार्टियों को बुलाव
description: Jammu Kashmir: NC संसद के मानसून सत्र के पहले दिन दिल्ली के जंतर-मंतर पर विशेष राज्य का दर्जा बहाल करने की मांग को लेकर प्रदर्शन करेगी। पार्टी सभी विपक्षी और दलों को शामिल होने का न्योता देगी।
content:
Farooq Abdullah Demands Jammu Kashmir Statehood: जम्मू-कश्मीर को विशेष राज्य का दर्जा बहाल करने की मांग को लेकर नेशनल कॉन्फ्रेंस ने अपने आंदोलन को तेज करने का फैसला किया है। पार्टी संसद के मानसून सत्र के पहले दिन नई दिल्ली के जंतर-मंतर पर बड़ा विरोध प्रदर्शन करेगी।
इसके लिए इंडिया गठबंधन के सभी सहयोगी दलों के साथ-साथ अन्य गैर-एनडीए राजनीतिक दलों को भी शामिल होने का औपचारिक निमंत्रण भेजा जाएगा। श्रीनगर में पार्टी अध्यक्ष फारूक अब्दुल्ला की अध्यक्षता में हुई बैठक में प्रदर्शन की रणनीति और तैयारियों को अंतिम रूप दिया गया। पार्टी का कहना है कि यह आंदोलन जम्मू-कश्मीर को राज्य का दर्जा और संवैधानिक अधिकार बहाल कराने की मांग को लेकर लोकतांत्रिक तरीके से जारी रहेगा।
सभी विपक्षी दलों को भेजा जाएगा न्योता
बैठक में यह निर्णय लिया गया कि इंडिया गठबंधन के सभी घटक दलों के साथ-साथ जम्मू-कश्मीर के अन्य राजनीतिक दलों को भी इस प्रदर्शन में शामिल होने के लिए औपचारिक रूप से आमंत्रित किया जाएगा। साथ ही यह भी तय किया गया कि उन राजनीतिक दलों को भी निमंत्रण भेजा जाएगा, जो इंडिया गठबंधन का हिस्सा नहीं हैं, लेकिन एनडीए से भी संबद्ध नहीं हैं।
फारूक अब्दुल्ला लिखेंगे आमंत्रण पत्र
पार्टी की ओर से सभी राजनीतिक दलों को औपचारिक आमंत्रण पत्र भेजे जाएंगे, और पार्टी अध्यक्ष फारूक अब्दुल्ला स्वयं संबंधित नेताओं को पत्र लिखकर प्रदर्शन में शामिल होने का निमंत्रण देंगे।यह कदम ऐसे समय में सामने आया है जब कुछ दिन पहले फारूक अब्दुल्ला ने स्पष्ट कहा था कि पार्टी किसी को भी इस आंदोलन में शामिल होने के लिए भीख मांगने नहीं जाएगी। उन्होंने कहा था कि जो भी इस आंदोलन में शामिल होना चाहता है, वह स्वयं आ सकता है, पार्टी किसी के पास नहीं जाएगी।
मानसून सत्र के पहले दिन होगा विरोध
उन्होंने यह भी कहा था कि उनकी पार्टी जम्मू-कश्मीर को राज्य का दर्जा बहाल करने की मांग को लेकर पहले से ही संघर्ष कर रही है और इसके लिए दिल्ली में विरोध प्रदर्शन किया जाएगा
नेशनल कॉन्फ्रेंस की और से यह भी कहा गया है कि संसद के मानसून सत्र के पहले दिन जंतर-मंतर पर यह प्रदर्शन राज्य का दर्जा बहाल करने और संवैधानिक अधिकारों की बहाली की मांग को लेकर किया जाएगा। पार्टी ने स्पष्ट किया है कि वह इस मुद्दे पर अपना आंदोलन जारी रखेगी और लोकतांत्रिक तरीके से अपनी मांगों को उठाती रहेगी।
ये भी पढ़ें-   Explainer: कल तक आलोचना, आज ‘फरिश्ता’! जानिए PM मोदी को लेकर क्यों अचानक बदल गए डोनाल्ड ट्रंप के सुर
राज्य का दर्जा बहाली पर जोर
जम्मू-कश्मीर को फिर से विशेष दर्जा मिलने की संभावना पर उन्होंने कहा, &#8221;मैं भगवान नहीं हूं। यह केवल अल्लाह जानता है और वे लोग जानते हैं जो दिल्ली में सत्ता में हैं।&#8221; उन्होंने कहा कि उनकी पार्टी विशेष दर्जे की बहाली के लिए संघर्ष कर रही है। हमें संविधान के तहत यह अधिकार है कि जिन अधिकारों को हमसे छीना गया है, उसके खिलाफ हम विरोध कर सकते हैं।

title: BSE bets big on rental income - Launches India’s first commercial real estate focused index | Details
description: The new index will facilitate the creation of passive investment products, including ETFs and index funds, offering investors diversified exposure to yield-generating real estate.
content: BSE Index Services, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE), has launched the BSE REITs and Commercial Real Estate Index. This marks India’s first dedicated benchmark tracking listed Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) and companies with substantial exposure to commercial real estate assets.The new index will facilitate the creation of passive investment products, including ETFs and index funds, offering investors diversified exposure to yield-generating real estate.The index includes listed REITs as well as companies from the residential and commercial projects segment that derive meaningful revenue from commercial real estate assets and rental income streams. It focuses on office, retail, and leasing-led business models.Announcing the launch, Ashutosh Singh, MD & CEO, BSE Index Services, said, "This is the first index in the industry which gives focused exposure to India’s yield-generating real estate ecosystem. It combines listed REITs with companies having significant commercial real estate assets and rental income streams… with a 20 per cent cap on individual constituents to ensure diversification."The BSE REITs and Commercial Real Estate Index has a base value of 1,000 with a base date of September 2022. It will be reconstituted semi-annually, in March and September.Ashutosh Singh stated that the index includes listed REITs as well as companies that own significant commercial real estate assets and possess rental income streams. A 20 per cent cap has been set for individual constituents to ensure diversification, making the index suitable for creating investable products and formulating specific investment strategies.According to the BSE, the new index is designed to serve as an underlying benchmark for exchange-traded funds (ETFs), index funds, portfolio management services (PMS), mutual fund schemes and institutional portfolios.The launch expands BSE’s portfolio of thematic indices and is expected to deepen the real estate investment market by providing a transparent, rules-based benchmark.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)
